clips.title: The Rooftop
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible pull-back. Begins as an extreme close-up on a person's eye, the iris detailed, a city skyline reflected in it. The camera then pulls back endlessly and impossibly in one seamless shot: away from the face, up off the rooftop, above the glittering night city, through the clouds, past the atmosphere into space, and out to reveal the whole spiral galaxy. A person on a rooftop. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous zoom out, cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Desert
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible pull-back. Opens on an extreme close-up of a person's eye under a bright sky, a vast desert reflected in the iris. The camera pulls back seamlessly and impossibly in one shot: off the face, rising above the golden dunes, higher into the sky, out past the curve of the planet, and away into a star-filled cosmos. A person standing in a desert. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous zoom out, cosmic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Shore
clips.prompt: Cinematic VFX, one continuous impossible pull-back. Starts as an extreme close-up on a person's eye at the beach, ocean and sky mirrored in it. The camera retreats endlessly in one seamless impossible move: away from the face, up above the shoreline, higher over the vast ocean, out beyond the blue planet, and into the deep star field of the universe. A person on a shore. Epic scale transition, seamless continuous zoom out, cosmic, 24fps.
